title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal receives his grandfather's photograph from Champaklal and vows to keep this treasured family heirloom safe.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal contacts Taarak after losing his wallet, which contains his grandfather's photo. He blames himself for his carelessness in losing such a precious memento.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Taarak assists Jethalal in the search for his wallet. Nattu Kaka suggests Jethalal find another way to get his grandfather's photograph.

subTitle: Jethalal turns to Sundarlal for assistance in locating his grandfather's photo and opens up about his worries to friends in Gokuldham Society.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal urges Daya to keep quiet about the missing wallet. Tapu finds out about the problem and decides to lend a hand.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: As Daya and Anjali turn to prayer, Jethalal and the Gokuldham residents exhaust every possibility in their search efforts.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu attempts to solve the problem creatively. Bagha searches for the thief. Jethalal prays desperately for a miracle.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal bravely tells Champaklal about the missing photograph, but an unforeseen turn of events follows.

subTitle: Champaklal exposes embarrassing stories from Jethalal's childhood. Tapu skips school to spend time with Champaklal's friends.

subTitle: Tapu and Jethalal plan to head to the camping site where Champaklal and his friends are staying.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal is irked by Bagha's new scheme. Taarak is fed up of disturbances that bother him while he tries to work.

subTitle: The Gadas are in a tight situation after learning about the reason behind Tapu's wish to shave his head.

subTitle: Everyone gathers in the compound of Gokuldham Society and tries to deter Tapu from taking a drastic decision.

subTitle: All of the Gokuldham men plan to escape from the resort, leaving their family members behind, in order to organise a secret party.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Determined to hide their secret, the Gokuldham men mix their alcohol into the soft drink. However, trouble ensues when Bagha drinks it after he eats his paneer chilli.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal and his friends begin to fear the worst when Bagha drinks the entire bottle of alcohol in one go. They eventually notice a change in Bagha's behaviour.

subTitle: After seeing Harsh's new smartphone, Tappu Sena wants one of his own and comes up with a plan for his father to buy it for him.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal strictly forbids Tabu from asking for a smartphone again, but Tapu still wants it and refuses to give up.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: After Jethalal realises that he has lost his valuable ring, chaos ensues in the society as the Gadas and the rest of the residents come together to look for it.

subTitle: Goli, Googi, and Sonu explain to their parents the importance of a smartphone as a plan to convince them; Jethalal eventually gives in to Tapu's request.

subTitle: The kids are extremely excited when their parents take them to look for new smartphones, but they all want expensive models.

subTitle: The kids go back to Gokuldham and excitedly snap photos. However, Sonu and Bhide find their phone missing from the bag.

subTitle: As the kids get more and more addicted to their smartphones, the fathers of Gokuldham confide in each other for a solution.

subTitle: The parents worry as the kids in Gokuldham society get completely addicted to their smartphones. Later, an angry individual comes to visit.

subTitle: The residents of Gokuldham society learn from the visitors that Tappu Sena has done a prank call and scared their child.

subTitle: Babita tells Jetha to exercise after she sees him unable to chase Tapu; The kids get into trouble for using their phones in class.

subTitle: Tapu and his friends come home and have to hide from their parents that their teachers have confiscated their phones.

subTitle: Jethalal finds himself in the midst of another crisis at Gokuldham.

subTitle: Tapu shows his friends his new smart watch, but Bhide is displeased with Tapu for buying it. Meanwhile, the ladies of the Gokuldham society gather at Babita's house for a cat party.

subTitle: Abdul asks clueless Bhide to watch his store as he has to deliver drinks to the cat party. Meanwhile, the residents feel sorry for the two salesmen who come to the society and want to buy their products.

subTitle: The residents let the salespeople inside their clubhouse to pitch their products, but they spike the residents' tea. Meanwhile, Abdul meets up with his store's supplier.

title: Gatha Shiv Parivaar Ki Ganesh Kartikey
subTitle: The untold story of the divine brothers of the Shiv Parivaar: Lord Ganesh and Lord Kartikeya. They are a family bound by devotion, challenged by destiny and united by eternal love.

subTitle: The residents of a housing society help each other find solutions when they face common real-life challenges and get involved in sticky situations.

subTitle: Anvita, a young caregiver, shoulders the burden of raising her five siblings. As she navigates her responsibilities and growing attachment to Virat, she's also supported by Sanjay, who harbours unrequited feelings for her.

subTitle: Popatlal disguises himself in a desperate effort to meet Dr Maalpani, but he is left baffled after finding out that Dr Maalpani has left.

subTitle: After failing to perform a sting operation on the black marketers, Popatlal decides to give it another shot with Jethalal at the helm of the operation.

subTitle: As Popatlal and Bharti eagerly wait for Jethalal to touch down at the resort, they believe that a waiter is keeping an eye on them. Jethalal and Champaklal enjoy the journey to the resort.

subTitle: Jethalal finally arrives at the resort. Popatlal feels upset when he realises that Champaklal and Bagha have tagged along.

subTitle: The men in Gokuldham face trouble as Champaklal announces to punish them, but they eventually learn that the latter decides to forgive everyone.

subTitle: Bhide finds a way to avoid promising his wife he will not drink in future. Dr Hathi pretends to be asleep to avoid making a similar promise to his wife.

subTitle: When Iyer expresses his desire to take a selfie, Jethalal decides to prank him. The residents of Gokuldham participate in a boat race.

subTitle: The residents of Gokuldham let their hair down and compete in a boat race before checking out of the resort.

subTitle: Taarak confides in Jethalal about his fight with Anjali. However, when Jethalal and Daya plan a dinner to cheer Taarak up, he refuses to come.

subTitle: Taarak has a fight with Anjali, but they sort it out after coming back home.

subTitle: Taarak tells Jethalal that he had a fight with Anjali earlier. Daya helps in trying to make him feel better.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: The women of Gokuldham try to find an effective solution to their expensive problem. A mysterious guest shows up after Daya's disappearance.

subTitle: Anjali decides to buy an idol for her relative and heads to the shop, but she is surprised to see the other women there.

subTitle: Tapu Sena are feeling bored as they have nothing to play in the clubhouse, but Popatlal promises he will give them games and things he plans to throw away.

subTitle: Daya has a plan with her friend. Tapu pranks Jethalal. Madhavi and Bhide try to start the scooter so they can drop Sonu off.

subTitle: When two junk men come to the society, Tapu Sena have to decide whom to sell their scraps and Bhide's scooter to. Popatlal is impressed by Tapu Sena's commitment.

subTitle: The residents are surprised by how much profit Tapu and his friends have made by selling scraps after they go around the society and brag about it.

subTitle: Bhide finds out that Tapu has sold his scooter and gets very upset. Daya learns of the news and has to help Tapu retrieve the scooter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Tapu apologises to Bhide for selling his scooter and asks to be punished. Two thieves steal Bhide's scooter. Tapu Sena go missing.

subTitle: Jethalal goes looking for Bhide's scooter in order to return it to him. However, the thieves are planning on selling it.

subTitle: The residents are tired of waiting helplessly for the scooter and decide to take matters into their own hands, but Jethalal finally comes back with it. However, Bhide doubts it is really his.

subTitle: Sharman Joshi and Boman Irani are still searching for the scooter. Bhide finds Abdul with his scooter. Jethalal explains how he got the scooter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide takes his scooter out for a ride and gets into an accident. Everyone tries to talk him out of using the scooter.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Bhide learns that his uncle is coming over and wants Madhavi to prepare lunch for him. Madhavi goes to Komal's place.

subTitle: Bhide's relatives visit just as he finds himself locked out of his own home. Faced with an embarrassing situation, Bhide asks Sodhi to break the door down.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal tries to stop Jethalal from eating junk food and ruining his health. Bagha approaches Jethalal and informs him that he has not signed an important cheque.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Champaklal informs Daya about a recent jewellery theft near Gokuldham. Their own safety is threatened when a thief breaks into Jethalal's house and points a gun at them.

subTitle: When everyone leaves for work early in the morning, Bhide struggles to start his scooter. Sodhi arrives and asks for a lift on Sakharam to his garage.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Two con artists, Vicky and Mona, come up with a plan to rob Gokuldham Society. Mona knocks on every door, introducing herself as Daya's friend.

subTitle: Vicky and Mona's scheme to rob Gokuldham Society unfolds flawlessly. Mona infiltrates Jethalal's home, targeting Daya's valuables.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: When Vicky and Mona reach a critical point in their Gokuldham Society heist, Popatlal unexpectedly spots them in the compound.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Vicky and Mona successfully carry out their plan to rob Gokuldham Society, managing to escape with the stolen jewellery.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Everyone in Gokuldham faces a harrowing ordeal as thieves make off with valuables in broad daylight. The police arrive at the society to conduct a thorough investigation into the circumstances surrounding the crime.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Abdul apprehends the jewellery thieves as they attempt to flee and returns them to Gokuldham. The police arrive to make arrests, but Inspector Pandey appears disgruntled.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal learns about the robbery and praises Inspector Pandey for catching the robbers. Bhide and Popatlal receive gifts from a mysterious benefactor.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Sanjana is in for a shock as Popatlal confesses his love for her in public. She eventually finds herself at a loss of words to respond to him.

subTitle: Bagha, Jethalal and Champaklal try to turn the tables on Sanjana to free Popatlal. The trio is shocked as Sanjana refuses to budge.

subTitle: As Sanjana talks to her boss about their plan, Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha overhear her. The trio confronts Sanjana about her intentions.

subTitle: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha find themselves in trouble when the black marketers realise their true identity and try to chase them down.

subTitle: Popatlal finds himself at a major risk of being electrocuted and starts to panic. Jethalal becomes disguised and looks for Popatlal.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: While Jethalal, Bagha and Champaklal are on the run from the black marketers, the police decide to intervene by visiting the resort.

subTitle: The black marketers find themselves in trouble when they see police officers waiting outside the resort. They try to laugh their way out to little avail.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha are worried as the police threaten to arrest them. The police inspector threatens to hand them a strict punishment.

subTitle: Chaos ensues as Inspector Pandey and his team begin to find Popatlal's belongings in the resort. Everyone realises that the sting operation has failed.

title: Taarak Mehta Ka Ooltah Chashmah
subTitle: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha are shocked as Madanlal taunts them about their inability to bring him to justice. He leaves the resort with Inspector Pandey's permission.

subTitle: Jethalal, Champaklal and Bagha cannot believe their ears when Inspector Pandey declares the mission a success.

subTitle: Bhide grows uncomfortable after watching Tapu and his friends dance together. Tapu tries to convince him to join them.
